productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Brown Shoes
description: Tapering leather loafers for men is the latest tongue-in-cheek statement from franco leone. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble.UpperLeather upper with a tapering toe boxReinforced overlay on the low-cut heel for support to the ankleSlip on styling with elasticated seams on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearabilityLeather liningPadded tongueSoft sockliner for instep comfortStitch detailing on the seams of the tow boxMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with an upraised heelTerraced grooves on the midfoot for grip and tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
